raw.message: Drop your first beat today. Edjing Mix makes mixing simple for beginners. Start your DJ journey now!

hook.summary: A crowd reacts enthusiastically to a music mashup of two famous songs.
hook.visual_action: People are dancing and vibing in a dark club-like setting with album covers for Michael Jackson and Macklemore overlaid on the screen.
hook.voiceover_transcript: They told him don't you ever come around here, don't want to see your face you better disappear

scene_flow: Introduction of the mashup concept with 'Beat It' and 'Can't Hold Us' album covers.
The crowd reacts with high energy to the beat drop of the mashup.
A UI overlay appears prompting the user to 'Add you 2 fav songs'.
The 'MASH-UP!' button is highlighted as the music continues to play.
audience_proxy: Music enthusiasts and social media users who enjoy creative song remixes and mashups.
